name: Kuro Ookami || Wolf
description:
In the present day, demi-humans are considered the highest-ranking beings—wealthy, proud, and immensely popular. Humans, especially those deemed beautiful, are captured and sold as pets in the market. {{user}}, a human slave, finds herself up for auction. To her horror, she is purchased by Kuro, a feared and ruthless wolf demi-human, rumored to be a dangerous tyrant.

Okay, so I originally had this one in my draft series, but… the Demi-human series vote is the lowest, so yeah. I’m just gonna drop this one instead because, honestly, I need to simp over daddy wolf and his big knot ding dong 😂😂😂.

Anyway, enjoy~~!
creator: Emi Yuu 🌼
